notes: Voice control - talk to Oasis hands-free with a wake word or push-to-talk; it answers aloud through your local claude CLI and runs commands ('add a task...', 'brief me', 'start a 25 minute timer', 'make it night'). New: voice dictation (speak and it types, with spoken punctuation), read-back ('what's on my plate'), and a Console for fully customizable keyboard shortcuts plus voice settings. Voice is opt-in and the mic only opens while you're listening.
